title: allosorus auratus
intro: Allosorus auratus, also known as the Marsh Cinnamon Fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the Osmundaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Allosorus auratus include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Allosorus auratus is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in tinctures and decoctions, to harness its medicinal properties.
